LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-20-2022 HEARING RE: MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL AS TO NATALIA GRIFFITH, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER ON THE MANDATORY JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As To Natalia Griffith.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order on the mandatory Judicial Council form which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
